description: Arithmetic involving a nullable column produces a nullable result

columns.name: next_age
columns.note: age is nullable, so age + 1 is also nullable

name: arithmetic_with_nullable
query_sql:
-- @name GetNextAge
-- @returns :many
SELECT age + 1 AS next_age FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
